text.title: Marketing Learnings Database Schema Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Marketing Learnings Database Schema. Each pairs symptom + sourced root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: 200 entries logged in Q1; 3 entries read in Q2; curator quit; DB abandoned by Q3.
antipattern.root-cause: curator-weekly-review rule violated; no review ritual.
antipattern.fix: Assign named curator with explicit weekly slot; archive un-touched entries automatically.

antipattern.symptom: Hypothesis field: 'improve creative'; result: 'better'; no future reader can apply.
antipattern.root-cause: hypothesis-falsifiable rule violated; schema accepted soft input.
antipattern.fix: Validator rejects hypotheses without verb + variable + direction; force resubmit.

antipattern.symptom: Learning 'offer-led headlines win' applied to BoFu retargeting; conversion drops 40%.
antipattern.root-cause: where_applicable was empty; team generalized a ToFu-only finding.
antipattern.fix: Enforce non-empty where_applicable; require channel + funnel-stage + segment tags.
